lineage.Process: Append gdb.ryalis.MonitDeforAcum MonitoreoDeforestacionAcumulado NO_TEST "anp_codi "Código ANP" true true false 50 Text 0 0 ,First,#,gdb.ryalis.MonitDeforAcum,anp_codi,-1,-1;md_fuente "Fuente" true true false 2 Short 0 5 ,First,#,gdb.ryalis.MonitDeforAcum,md_fuente,-1,-1;zi_codi "Código ZI" true true false 50 Text 0 0 ,First,#,gdb.ryalis.MonitDeforAcum,zi_codi,-1,-1;md_causa "Uso de suelo" true true false 2 Short 0 5 ,First,#,gdb.ryalis.MonitDeforAcum,md_causa,-1,-1;md_anno "Año de monitoreo" true true false 4 Long 0 10 ,First,#,gdb.ryalis.MonitDeforAcum,md_anno,-1,-1;md_fecimg "Fecha imagen" true true false 8 Date 0 0 ,First,#,gdb.ryalis.MonitDeforAcum,md_fecimg,-1,-1;md_sup "Superficie" true true false 8 Double 8 38 ,First,#,gdb.ryalis.MonitDeforAcum,md_sup,-1,-1;md_exa "ExA" true true false 50 Text 0 0 ,First,#,gdb.ryalis.MonitDeforAcum,md_exa,-1,-1;md_conf "Confiabilidad" true true false 2 Short 0 5 ,First,#,gdb.ryalis.MonitDeforAcum,md_conf,-1,-1;md_bosque "Tipo de bosque" true true false 2 Short 0 5 ,First,#,gdb.ryalis.MonitDeforAcum,md_bosque,-1,-1;md_zonif "Zonificacion ANP / ACR" true true false 50 Text 0 0 ,First,#,gdb.ryalis.MonitDeforAcum,md_zonif,-1,-1;md_obs "Observaciones" true true false 50 Text 0 0 ,First,#,gdb.ryalis.MonitDeforAcum,md_obs,-1,-1;globalid "globalid" false false true 38 GlobalID 0 0 ,First,#,gdb.ryalis.MonitDeforAcum,globalid,-1,-1;created_user "created_user" false true false 255 Text 0 0 ,First,#,gdb.ryalis.MonitDeforAcum,created_user,-1,-1;created_date "created_date" false true false 8 Date 0 0 ,First,#,gdb.ryalis.MonitDeforAcum,created_date,-1,-1;last_edited_user "last_edited_user" false true false 255 Text 0 0 ,First,#,gdb.ryalis.MonitDeforAcum,last_edited_user,-1,-1;last_edited_date "last_edited_date" false true false 8 Date 0 0 ,First,#,gdb.ryalis.MonitDeforAcum,last_edited_date,-1,-1;st_area(shape) "st_area(shape)" false false true 0 Double 0 0 ,First,#,gdb.ryalis.MonitDeforAcum,st_area(shape),-1,-1;st_length(shape) "st_length(shape)" false false true 0 Double 0 0 ,First,#,gdb.ryalis.MonitDeforAcum,st_length(shape),-1,-1" #
CalculateField MonitoreoDeforestacionAcumulado md_anno 2024 Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

CopyMultiple "'E:\21_GFP-SN-SECO\Línea Base\gdb_monit_template_JV_21_04_2025.gdb\MonitoreoDeforestacionAcumulado' FeatureClass" "E:\21_GFP-SN-SECO\Línea Base\gdb_monit_template_JV-ACR.gdb" MonitoreoDeforestacionAcumulado "MonitoreoDeforestacionAcumulado FeatureClass MonitoreoDeforestacionAcumulado #"
CalculateField MonitoreoDeforestacionAcumulado_ACR17_ACRMK anp_codi "ZI ACR Maijuna Kichwa" PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField MonitoreoDeforestacionAcumulado_ACR17_ACRMK anp_codi "ACR Maijuna Kichwa" PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.
